title: Surgeon general nominee and senator face off over vaccines and ‘shared decision-making’
description: Casey Means wanted to talk about chronic disease. But Bill Cassidy wanted to hear about her views on vaccines.
content: Casey Means wanted to talk about chronic disease. But Bill Cassidy wanted to hear about her views on vaccines.
